info.name: CICD Dashboard Backend
info.description:
All endpoints for the CI/CD Dashboard backend.

Set the `baseUrl` variable to switch between local and deployed:
- Local: http://localhost:3001
- Deployed: https://api.staging.redappletech.com/cicd

request.description: Returns {ok: true} if the backend is running.

Returns the enriched job list with build status, PR info, ArgoCD sync status, and pipeline stage breakdown. Refreshed every 60s from Jenkins + GitHub + ArgoCD. Returns cached data immediately on subsequent calls (304 if unchanged).
Returns the current Jenkins build queue (pending builds) and executor status (busy/idle agents).
Returns raw list of all Jenkins jobs with last build number, result, and timestamp.
Returns details for a specific Jenkins job including last build info and SCM config.

query.description: Number of recent builds to return (default: 10)

request.description: Returns the last N builds for a job with result, timestamp, and duration.

query.description: Byte offset for progressive log streaming (default: 0)

request.description: Returns the console log text for a specific build. Use 'start' offset for progressive streaming of large logs.
Triggers a new build for the specified Jenkins job. Fetches a fresh CSRF crumb + session cookie before each trigger. Returns {ok: true} on success.

Returns per-node scheduling capacity from the K8s API.

Each node includes:
- allocatable: total CPU (millicores), memory (MiB), pods
- requests: sum of all running pod resource requests
- limits: sum of all running pod resource limits
- ciReserve: CPU + memory carved out for Jenkins CI agents
- namespaces: per-namespace breakdown sorted by pod count

Free schedulable = allocatable - requests - ciReserve
